user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend. Can you fetch the latest distributions for ETFs and funds? Additionally, provide me with the current market articles to stay updated on investment trends. It would also be helpful to get the performance of the stocks in the last 24 hours.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest distributions for ETFs and funds.
Provide current market articles to stay updated on investment trends.
Get the performance of stocks in the last 24 hours.
